notes: Skeptical read-only reviewer. Prefer the strongest reasoning model available because advisor output can block workflow progress.
Turns accepted specs into plans and task checklists. Needs strong reasoning and enough context to compare artifacts.
Writes code and tests within task.md. Needs tool use and coding reliability more than maximum deliberation.
Reviews artifact alignment and implementation evidence. Prefer models that catch omissions and regressions.
Runs verification and fixes small in-scope defects. Needs reliable command execution and concise reporting.
Drafts current-state Project Baseline updates after user acceptance. Keep the model inexpensive and precise.
